# AgentLaunchOps

Paid developer source kits for SaaS billing, license keys, metered APIs, and Stripe revenue operations.

## Live Paid Products

- Stripe SaaS Billing Toolkit Bundle ($79): six Node source kits for Stripe SaaS billing workflows: team seats, usage alerts, MRR analytics, invoice tax, cancel-save, and metered API access.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-saas-billing-kits-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/qmcpos
- GHA Guard Pro Kit ($29): GitHub Actions security source kit for workflow permission drift, mutable action refs, unsafe pull_request_target patterns, checkout credential persistence, PR report evidence, and hardened Node release templates.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/gha-guard-pro-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/auqpvm
- GitHub Actions Workflow Scanner for Node Repos ($29): buyer guide for local workflow scanning with the live GHA Guard Pro Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/github-actions-workflow-scanner.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/auqpvm
- GitHub Actions Permissions Hardening for Node Repos ($29): buyer guide for tightening token permissions, checkout credentials, and least-privilege workflow defaults with the live GHA Guard Pro Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/github-actions-permissions-hardening.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/auqpvm
- License Launch Kit ($25): Node source kit for license issuing, verification, revocation, Stripe checkout fulfillment, webhook retry safety, manual Base USDC orders, and buyer smoke checks for paid CLIs, plugins, templates, private downloads, and small SaaS add-ons.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/license-key-server-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/license_launch_kit2026
- Stripe Team Seat Kit ($29): Node source kit for Stripe per-seat billing, subscription quantity sync, workspace invites, paid seat-limit enforcement, downgrade checks, and idempotent webhook handling.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-per-seat-billing-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/vpbnu
- Stripe Team Seat Kit Product Page ($29): Gumroad-first page for the live source package, positioned around paid seats, workspace invites, subscription quantity changes, and seat-count enforcement after checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-team-seat-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/vpbnu
- Stripe Usage Alerts Kit ($29): Node source kit for Stripe metered-billing usage alerts, near-limit warnings, overage notices, invoice usage sync, queued notification records, and customer usage summaries.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-usage-alerts-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/aohsrs
- Stripe Usage Alerts Kit Product Page ($29): Gumroad-first page for the live source package, positioned around usage thresholds, overage notices, and webhook-safe summaries.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-usage-alerts-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/aohsrs
- Stripe Usage Limit Notifications for Node ($29): buyer guide for quota warnings, limit-reached notices, overage alerts, and monthly usage summaries backed by the live Stripe Usage Alerts Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-usage-limit-notifications-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/aohsrs
- Stripe MRR Analytics Kit ($29): Node source kit for Stripe MRR dashboards, ARR snapshots, churn metrics, paid-invoice revenue, refunds, net revenue, and finance handoff reports.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-mrr-analytics-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/juzzin
- Stripe MRR Dashboard for Node ($29): buyer guide for MRR dashboard, ARR snapshot, churn metric, paid invoice, refund, net revenue, finance close, and subscription revenue analytics searches backed by the live Stripe MRR Analytics Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-mrr-dashboard-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/juzzin
- Stripe Invoice Tax Kit ($29): Node source kit for Stripe invoice tax ID collection, billing-address capture, Checkout invoice metadata, signed invoice webhooks, duplicate-safe invoice state, escaped receipt rendering, and finance review packets.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-invoice-tax-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/knpcbo
- Stripe Invoice Tax ID Collection for Node ($29): buyer guide for checkout metadata, customer tax ID capture, signed invoice webhooks, receipt data, and tax review fields backed by the live Stripe Invoice Tax Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-invoice-tax-id-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/knpcbo
- Stripe Invoice Webhook Tax Metadata for Node ($29): buyer guide for signed Stripe invoice webhooks, duplicate-safe invoice events, invoice tax metadata, receipt review records, and billing audit searches backed by the live Stripe Invoice Tax Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-invoice-webhook-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/knpcbo
- Metered API Launch Kit ($29): Node source kit for one-time API keys, quota enforcement, usage logs, customer usage summaries, duplicate-safe Stripe checkout fulfillment, and manual USDC order review.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/metered-api-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/lygkci
- Stripe Cancel Save Kit ($29): Gumroad-first product page for the live source kit for Stripe cancellation surveys, optional save offers, clear final cancellation, webhook-backed subscription state, support records, and churn analytics.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-cancel-save-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ogodr
- Stripe Cancel Save Flow for Node ($29): buyer guide for cancellation survey, save-offer flow, retention offer, subscription cancellation, support record, and churn analytics searches backed by the live Stripe Cancel Save Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-cancel-save-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ogodr

- AI Credits Billing Kit ($29): Node source kit for selling AI usage credits with Stripe credit packs, token estimates, reservation holds before model calls, finalized usage charges, unused-credit refunds, failed-call voids, insufficient-credit checks, and duplicate-safe credit ledgers.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/ai-credits-billing-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wjfxhu

- AI Usage Credits Billing for Node ($29): buyer guide for AI usage credits, token metering, Stripe credit packs, reservation holds, finalized usage refunds, insufficient-credit rejects, failed-call voids, and duplicate-safe consumption backed by the live AI Credits Billing Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/ai-usage-credits-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wjfxhu

- Clerk Stripe Org Kit ($29): Node source kit for Clerk organizations, Stripe subscriptions, customer/org mapping, deleted-org cleanup, org seats, entitlement snapshots, and webhook-safe access checks.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/clerk-stripe-org-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ghekag

- Clerk Stripe Org Webhooks for Node ($29): buyer guide for Clerk organization billing, Stripe subscription webhooks, Clerk/Svix webhooks, customer/org mapping, deleted-org cleanup, org seats, entitlement snapshots, and access checks backed by the live Clerk Stripe Org Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/clerk-stripe-org-webhooks-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ghekag

- Lemon Squeezy Subscription Kit ($29): Node source kit for Lemon Squeezy webhooks in Node, subscription entitlement sync, checkout URL handoff, refund/cancel access removal, license activation limits, and buyer smoke tests.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/lemon-squeezy-subscription-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wcxuo

- Lemon Squeezy Webhooks for Node ($29): buyer guide mapping Lemon Squeezy webhook and subscription entitlement searches to the live Lemon Squeezy Subscription Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/lemon-squeezy-webhooks-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wcxuo

- Stripe Connect Marketplace Kit ($29): Node source kit for Stripe Connect Express onboarding, seller readiness, destination charges, platform fees, and signed webhook reconciliation.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-connect-marketplace-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/kusejgu

- Stripe Connect Webhooks for Node ($29): buyer guide mapping account.updated, seller capability readiness, destination-charge, platform-fee, and checkout reconciliation searches to the live Stripe Connect Marketplace Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-connect-webhooks-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/kusejgu

- Stripe Connect Express Onboarding for Node ($29): buyer guide mapping Express onboarding, account links, connected-account capability checks, seller readiness, destination Checkout, and platform-fee searches to the live Stripe Connect Marketplace Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-connect-onboarding-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/kusejgu

- Stripe Customer Portal Kit ($19): Node source kit for authenticated Stripe Customer Portal links, safe return URLs, billing-status UI data, webhook-backed subscription state, and entitlement sync.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-customer-portal-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/gdqea

- Billing State UI Kit ($29): Node source kit for post-checkout Stripe billing dashboards, failed-payment states, entitlement block reasons, usage-limit warnings, support briefs, read-only finance review packets, payout reconciliation, reserves, credits, disputes, and refunds.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/billing-state-ui-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/bynzbs

- Stripe Billing Support Briefs for Node ($29): buyer guide for support-ready billing briefs, failed-payment state, entitlement blockers, usage-limit context, customer billing panels, and finance close packets backed by the live Billing State UI Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-billing-support-brief-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/bynzbs

- Stripe Entitlement Audit for Node SaaS ($29): buyer guide for subscription state, feature gates, blocked-access reasons, usage-limit warnings, and support handoff evidence backed by the live Billing State UI Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-entitlement-audit-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/bynzbs

- Stripe Dunning Recovery Kit ($29): Node source kit for Stripe failed-payment webhooks, dunning ladders, recovery email queues, hosted-invoice reminders, and subscription-save workflows.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-dunning-recovery-kit.html
  Checkout: https://buy.stripe.com/cNi3co9cG8Oj1CS4XA3sI00
  Gumroad draft: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/gsihx
  Gumroad paid-file upload is still pending; card and Base USDC delivery are the current live buyer paths.

- Stripe Dispute Evidence Kit ($29): Node source kit for Stripe dispute webhooks, reason-specific evidence checks, response payload builders, reviewer summaries, readiness analytics, and chargeback handoff records.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-dispute-evidence-kit.html
  Checkout: https://buy.stripe.com/cNi3co9cG8Oj1CS4XA3sI00
  Gumroad draft: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/xldig
  Gumroad paid-file upload is still pending; card and Base USDC delivery are the current live buyer paths.

- GridPilot CMS ($19): Webflow CMS source kit for Collection List search, filters, sorting, favorites, pagination, URL state, and Leaflet map markers.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/gridpilot-cms.html
  Checkout: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/gridpilot-cms.html#checkout
  Gumroad draft: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ukanyy
  Gumroad paid-file upload is still pending; direct Base USDC delivery is the current live buyer path.

- Stripe Webhook Replay Kit ($19): Node source kit for raw-body Stripe webhook signature checks, failed-event storage, duplicate-safe fulfillment, idempotent replay locks, admin retry endpoints, and support recovery workflows.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-webhook-replay-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wfhzbp

- Supabase Entitlement Kit ($29): Node and SQL source kit for Stripe-synced Supabase workspace plans, seats, entitlement snapshots, RLS-readable billing state, and server-side feature gates.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/supabase-entitlement-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/cwrhl

- Supabase Entitlements for Node ($29): buyer guide for Supabase workspace plans, Stripe webhook entitlement sync, seat limits, entitlement snapshots, RLS-readable billing state, and server-side feature gates backed by the live Supabase Entitlement Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/supabase-entitlements-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/cwrhl

- Supabase RLS Tenant Kit ($29): Node and SQL source kit for Supabase tenant-isolation review before launch, workspace membership RLS policies, signed tenant context, stale-role rejection, cross-tenant denial tests, admin-only audit writes, server-side role guards, and buyer verification.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/supabase-rls-tenant-kit.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ipqgkx

- Supabase RLS Policies for Node ($29): buyer guide for multi-tenant Supabase RLS policy examples, tenant isolation, workspace membership policies, signed tenant context, stale-role rejection, and server-side role checks backed by the live Supabase RLS Tenant Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/supabase-rls-policies-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/ipqgkx

## Comparison Page

- Stripe SaaS Billing Toolkit Bundle ($79): Gumroad bundle for six live Stripe billing source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-saas-billing-kits-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/qmcpos
- GitHub Actions Workflow Scanner for Node Repos: buyer guide mapping workflow scanner searches to the live paid GHA Guard Pro Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/github-actions-workflow-scanner.html
- GitHub Actions Permissions Hardening for Node Repos: buyer guide mapping permission-hardening searches to the live paid GHA Guard Pro Kit.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/github-actions-permissions-hardening.html
- Stripe Billing Boilerplate for Node SaaS: broader buyer guide mapping Stripe billing boilerplate searches to the six live paid Stripe source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-billing-boilerplate-node.html
- Stripe Subscription Billing for Node SaaS ($79): checkout-backed buyer guide mapping subscription billing workflow searches to the live Stripe SaaS Billing Toolkit bundle.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-subscription-billing-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/qmcpos
- Stripe Checkout Subscriptions for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping Stripe Checkout subscription workflow searches to the six live paid Stripe source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-checkout-subscriptions-node.html
- Stripe Subscription Management for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping subscription management workflow searches to the six live paid Stripe source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-subscription-management-node.html
- Stripe Billing Portal Integration for Node ($19): buyer guide mapping Stripe billing portal, authenticated Customer Portal links, safe return URLs, webhook-backed subscription state, and entitlement searches to the live Stripe Customer Portal Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-customer-portal-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/gdqea
- Stripe Billing Dashboard for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping billing dashboard searches to live paid source kits for SaaS billing UI workflows.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-billing-dashboard-node.html
- Stripe Metered Billing for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping metered billing workflow searches to live paid usage-based billing source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-metered-billing-node.html
- Stripe Usage Based Billing for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping usage-based billing searches to live paid metered API, usage alerts, MRR analytics, invoice tax, and cancel-save source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-usage-based-billing-node.html
- Stripe Webhook Billing for Node SaaS: buyer guide mapping Stripe webhook billing searches to live paid Stripe source kits for seats, usage alerts, revenue snapshots, invoice tax review, cancel-save flows, and metered API access.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-webhook-billing-node.html
- Stripe Webhook Replay for Node: buyer guide mapping failed Stripe webhook replay searches to the live Stripe Webhook Replay Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-webhook-replay-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wfhzbp
- Stripe Webhook Idempotency for Node: buyer guide mapping duplicate Stripe event, retry-safe handler, and replay-lock searches to the live Stripe Webhook Replay Kit checkout.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-webhook-idempotency-node.html
  Checkout: https://launchagent.gumroad.com/l/wfhzbp
- Stripe SaaS Starter Kit for Node: buyer guide mapping Stripe SaaS starter kit searches to the six live paid Stripe source kits.
  Page: https://agentlaunchops-ai.github.io/agentlaunchops-offers/stripe-saas-starter-kit-node.html
